notes: RPG Maker MV/MZ vertical-slice pair-policy (analogous to sweetie-hd-alpha-1). Same single (modelId, providerId) primary pair pinned for every agentic-loop stage; OpenRouter-side ZDR-allow-list fallback is the resilience mechanism (provider.order=[providerId] + allow_fallbacks=true + zdr=true + data_collection=deny). The driver bounds the live slice to ONE dialogue surface (--engine-profile rpg-maker-mv-mz translates only the targeted unit, rest no-op), so a full run bills a single ZDR translation invocation. Unlike RealLive, the sentinel is NOT SJIS-bracket-wrapped: RPG Maker stores plain JSON string literals, so the sentinel is prefixed directly and the kaifuu-rpgmaker patchback splices it byte-surgically into one Map/CommonEvent Show-Text literal; the utsushi-rpgmaker-mv E1 text-trace then asserts it lands in an emitted TextLine. sceneId is carried for schema conformance but unused by the MV/MZ JSON extractor (which walks the whole www/data tree). Per-stage zdr / seed / maxPriceUsd are intentionally omitted: the parser fills canonical defaults. Operator-level zdr downgrades require OPENROUTER_ZDR_DOWNGRADE; no file-level escape hatch.
